meta.description: A goal — an outcome to work toward with a deadline and success criteria

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_1e39528a_9369_47e8_a1c1_0705a10964a3" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "success_criteria" TEXT,
    "due_date" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "owner" TEXT,
    "parent_goal" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_1e39528a_9369_47e8_a1c1_0705a10964a3" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_1e39528a936947e8_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
